winterfell.title_template: Whispers of Winterfell – {duration} Deep Sleep & Relaxation Music

thumbnail_brief.scene: Winterfell at night in cold blue moonlight

prompts: Gentle ambient sleep music inspired by a frozen northern castle. Soft piano melody with reverb over sustained string pads and cold wind textures. Slow tempo at 60 BPM, very quiet dynamics. Calm, meditative, melancholic. No vocals, no drums, no percussion.

Deep ambient drone with layered cello harmonics. Distant choir-like pad sounds, frost crystallizing textures, subtle low-frequency warmth. Extremely slow evolution, hypnotic repetition. No rhythm, no beats.

Soft fingerpicked acoustic guitar with heavy hall reverb. Gentle sustained violin notes, breathing wind textures, falling snow ambience. 55 BPM, pianissimo dynamics throughout. Peaceful, nostalgic, bittersweet.

Warm analog synth pad slowly evolving over 30 seconds. Subtle granular ice textures, distant low brass warmth, soft filtered noise resembling blizzard. Ambient, formless, deeply relaxing. No melody, no rhythm.
Delicate music box melody with extreme reverb and delay. Soft string ensemble sustain, winter wind field recording blended underneath. Very slow, barely moving. Lullaby-like, ancient, frozen in time.

kings_landing.title_template: Echoes of King's Landing – {duration} Deep Sleep & Relaxation Music

music_brief.style: warm ambient sleep music with mediterranean influences

thumbnail_brief.scene: King's Landing palace at golden sunset

prompts: Warm ambient music with gentle classical harp arpeggios and soft legato strings. Mediterranean summer night atmosphere. 65 BPM, mezzo-piano dynamics. Royal, elegant, peaceful. No vocals, no drums.
Soft baroque-inspired harpsichord with heavy reverb and warm pad underneath. Distant flute ornaments, candlelight atmosphere. Slow and stately, rich harmonic movement. No percussion.
Lush string quartet playing very softly, slow sustained bowing. Gentle harp glissandos, warm room reverb. Regal and intimate, like a quiet evening in a palace. 58 BPM, pianissimo.
Ambient pad with golden warm timbre, subtle plucked lute melody. Soft choir aahs in the distance, Mediterranean breeze textures. Deeply calming, opulent, sleepy. No rhythm section.
Solo classical guitar with nylon strings, slow tremolo technique. Warm string pad accompaniment, distant bell tower chimes. Peaceful night in an ancient city. Very quiet, very slow.

targaryen.title_template: Targaryen Dreams – {duration} Deep Sleep & Dark Ambient Music

music_brief.style: dark ethereal ambient, mystical sleep music

thumbnail_brief.scene: Dragon silhouette against a blood-red sky at night
thumbnail_brief.style: dark, dramatic, red and black tones

prompts: Ethereal ambient music with mysterious dark choir pads and ancient temple atmosphere. Deep reverb on everything, subtle dragon-breath wind textures. 55 BPM, pianissimo dynamics. No vocals, no drums, no percussion.

Dark ambient drone with layered low brass sustain and shimmering high-frequency textures like distant fire. Slow evolving pad, mystical and otherworldly. Extremely minimal movement. No rhythm, no melody.
Soft duduk-like woodwind melody with heavy reverb over warm analog synth pad. Volcanic heat atmosphere, embers floating. 50 BPM, very quiet. Ancient, powerful yet peaceful. No drums.
Deep cello sustained notes with granular fire crackle textures blended underneath. Distant ethereal female voice pad (not lyrics, just texture). Dark, meditative, timeless. No beats.
Warm string ensemble playing extremely slowly, each note lasting 8 seconds. Subtle metallic shimmer textures, heat haze atmosphere. Royal and ancient, deeply hypnotic. No percussion.

the_wall.title_template: Beyond The Wall – {duration} Deep Sleep & Dark Ambient Music

thumbnail_brief.scene: The Wall towering in darkness with aurora borealis

prompts: Dark ambient music with frozen wasteland atmosphere. Deep bass drones at 30Hz, howling arctic wind field recordings. Vast, desolate, endless. Extremely slow evolution. No melody, no rhythm, no vocals.
Ice cave ambience with resonant dripping textures and deep sub-bass rumble. Distant horn call echoing across tundra. 40 BPM at most, barely perceptible pulse. Isolating, cold, immense.
Low cello drone with heavy distortion and reverb. Blizzard wind noise layered with granular ice crystal textures. Dark, foreboding, hypnotic. No percussion, no vocals.
Massive reverb space with occasional deep brass stabs fading into silence. Wind howl textures, frozen ground creaking sounds. Sparse, monumental, lonely. Each sound event 20+ seconds apart.
Soft filtered white noise resembling arctic wind over deep warm pad. Subtle pitch bending, glacial movement. Meditative and vast, like standing at the edge of the world. No drums, no melody.

highgarden.title_template: Gardens of Highgarden – {duration} Gentle Sleep & Relaxation Music

thumbnail_brief.scene: Beautiful garden at golden hour with roses

prompts: Gentle pastoral ambient music with soft baroque flute melody and warm harp arpeggios. Blooming garden atmosphere, birdsong textures in the distance. 65 BPM, piano dynamics. No drums, no vocals.
Warm acoustic guitar fingerpicking with heavy spring reverb. Soft string pad accompaniment, gentle breeze and leaf rustle textures. Sunny, peaceful, idyllic. 60 BPM, very quiet.
Lush string quartet playing legato at pianissimo. Gentle woodwind ornaments, flower garden ambience. Rich harmonic movement, warm and inviting. No percussion, no vocals.
Soft celesta melody with music box quality over warm analog pad. Butterfly wing textures, warm sunshine atmosphere. Delicate, dreamy, innocent. 55 BPM, extremely gentle.
Ambient harp glissandos with long reverb tails over soft choir aahs. Garden fountain water textures blended underneath. Heavenly, serene, timeless. No rhythm section.

dorne.title_template: Dornish Nights – {duration} Deep Sleep & Relaxation Music

music_brief.style: desert ambient, warm exotic sleep music

thumbnail_brief.scene: Desert palace under a starry night sky

prompts: Warm desert ambient with soft oud melody and gentle nylon string guitar. Starry night oasis atmosphere, distant sand wind textures. 58 BPM, mezzo-piano. No drums, no vocals.
Middle-eastern inspired ambient with soft qanun plucking and warm pad. Spice market at night, warm breeze, palm trees rustling. Exotic, peaceful, sensual. No percussion.
Deep warm synth pad with subtle arabic scale ornaments on soft flute. Desert night sky, cooling sand, distant campfire crackle. Meditative, ancient, vast. 50 BPM.
Soft frame drum pattern at 55 BPM (very quiet, barely audible pulse) with oud harmonics and warm reverb. Moonlit palace courtyard, fountain water. Intimate, luxurious, sleepy.
Layered ambient drones in warm golden tones with subtle sand grain textures. Occasional soft bell chime, desert wind. Timeless, expansive, deeply relaxing. No melody, no rhythm.

godswood.title_template: Godswood Meditation – {duration} Deep Sleep & Spiritual Music

music_brief.style: spiritual meditation ambient, ancient forest soundscape

thumbnail_brief.scene: Ancient weirwood tree with red leaves in dark forest

prompts: Ancient forest ambient with deep meditation drones and rustling leaf textures. Soft wooden flute melody, spiritual and calm. 50 BPM, pianissimo throughout. No drums, no vocals.
Granular wood creaking and forest atmosphere over deep warm pad. Distant bird call, gentle stream water sound. Sacred, primordial, grounding. Extremely slow movement. No rhythm.
Soft bowed psaltery or dulcimer with extreme reverb in forest space. Layered leaf rustle and gentle wind textures. Ancient, mystical, connected to earth. 45 BPM, barely there.
Deep throat singing inspired drone with forest ambience overlay. Heartbeat-like sub-bass pulse at 60 BPM (very subtle). Roots, earth, ancient wisdom. No percussion, no vocals.
Ambient pad evolving through natural minor scale very slowly. Owl call in distance, night forest atmosphere, soft moss textures. Sacred grove at midnight, deeply peaceful. No drums.

castamere.title_template: Rains of Castamere – {duration} Deep Sleep & Melancholic Music

music_brief.style: melancholic dark ambient, tragic beauty sleep music

thumbnail_brief.scene: Ruined castle in the rain at night

prompts: Melancholic ambient with distant solo cello playing slow sustained notes. Rain on stone textures, ruined castle atmosphere. Haunting, beautiful, sorrowful. 48 BPM, pianissimo. No drums, no vocals.
Dark piano chords with extreme reverb, each chord ringing for 10 seconds. Dripping water in empty halls, cold stone echo. Lonely, ghostly, elegant. No rhythm, no percussion.
Soft viola melody in minor key over warm pad drone. Gentle rain field recording, abandoned corridors atmosphere. Bittersweet, nostalgic, fading glory. 52 BPM, very quiet.
Deep organ-like pad with subtle choir texture. Distant thunder rumble, rain against windows. Grand but empty, majestic in ruin. Extremely slow harmonic movement. No beats.
Solo acoustic guitar in minor key with heavy room reverb. Rain textures, stone dripping, cold wind through broken windows. Beautiful desolation, peaceful mourning. 50 BPM, no other instruments.
